session.user:
Run prettier to check formatting on these two files and report results: - .claude/skills/cmux/SKILL.md - .claude/skills/cmux/references/cmux-reference.md
Run: `prettier --check .claude/skills/cmux/SKILL.md .claude/skills/cmux/references/cmux-reference.md` and report results. If there are formatting issues, run `prettier --write` on them and report what changed.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to check the formatting on those two files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on cmux skill files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 [[33mwarn[39m] .claude/skills/cmux/SKILL.md [[33mwarn[39m] .claude/skills/cmux/references/cmux-reference.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
Checking formatting...
session.assistant: Prettier found formatting issues in both files. Now I'll run prettier with --write to fix them:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Fix prettier formatting on cmux skill files

session.assistant:
prettier passed: Both files formatted successfully.
**Results:** - **Code style issues found**: 2 files had formatting issues - **Fixed**: Both files reformatted using prettier --write - `.claude/skills/cmux/SKILL.md` (97ms) - `.claude/skills/cmux/references/cmux-reference.md` (80ms)
The files have been updated with proper prettier formatting.
